scripts.sync:recovery: python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/extract_assets.py --apk ../../arel_wars1/arel_wars_1.apk --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1 --web-root public/recovery && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/render_timeline_candidate_strips.py --assets-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/apk_unzip/assets --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/timeline_candidate_strips && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_runtime_preview.py --report ../../recovery/arel_wars1/binary_asset_report.json --sequence-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/frame_sequence_candidates --timeline-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/timeline_candidate_strips --web-root public/recovery && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_opcode_action_map.py --script-report ../../recovery/arel_wars1/script_event_report.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.opcode_action_map.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_tutorial_opcode_chains.py --script-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/decoded/zt1/assets/script_eng --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.tutorial_opcode_chains.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/scan_aw1_inline_map_pointer.py --ai-table ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/XlsAi.eng.parsed.json --stage-progression ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.stage_progression.json --map-binding ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.map_binding_candidates.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.inline_map_pointer_scan.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_stage_bindings.py --stage-progression ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.stage_progression.json --map-binding ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.map_binding_candidates.json --inline-pointer-scan ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.inline_map_pointer_scan.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.stage_bindings.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_render_semantics.py --assets-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/apk_unzip/assets --effect-runtime-links ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.effect_runtime_links.json --timeline-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/timeline_candidate_strips --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.render_semantics.json --web-output public/recovery/analysis/aw1_render_semantics.json --web-render-root public/recovery/analysis/render && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_engine_schema.py --parsed-dir ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables --effect-runtime-links ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.effect_runtime_links.json --render-semantics ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.render_semantics.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.engine_schema.json --web-output public/recovery/analysis/aw1_engine_schema.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_battle_model.py --battle-catalog ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.battle_catalog.json --engine-schema ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.engine_schema.json --hero-archetypes ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.hero_runtime_archetypes.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.battle_model.json --web-output public/recovery/analysis/aw1_battle_model.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_runtime_blueprint.py --parsed-dir ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables --binary-report ../../recovery/arel_wars1/binary_asset_report.json --script-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/decoded/zt1/assets/script_eng --opcode-map ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.opcode_action_map.json --stage-bindings ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.stage_bindings.json --tutorial-chains ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.tutorial_opcode_chains.json --render-semantics ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.render_semantics.json --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.runtime_blueprint.json --web-output public/recovery/analysis/aw1_runtime_blueprint.json && python3 ../../tools/arel_wars1/export_aw1_render_pack.py --preview-manifest public/recovery/analysis/preview_manifest.json --runtime-blueprint ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.runtime_blueprint.json --render-semantics ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.render_semantics.json --bank-probe-root ../../recovery/arel_wars1/mpl_bank_composite_probes --output ../../recovery/arel_wars1/parsed_tables/AW1.render_pack.json --web-root public/recovery/analysis
scripts.build: npm run sync:recovery && tsc && vite build
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug)
scripts.android:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease)
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build
